name: Supabase
what_it_does: Open-source Firebase alternative providing Postgres database, authentication, realtime subscriptions, object storage, and edge functions as a unified backend platform.
use_cases: Full backend for AI agent apps: Postgres DB + auth + storage + realtime in one platform
Vector search for RAG systems using pgvector extension in Supabase Postgres
User authentication and session management with Row Level Security for multi-tenant agents
Realtime event subscriptions for agents to react to database changes via Postgres CDC
File storage with automatic image transforms and CDN delivery via Supabase Storage
not_for: Applications requiring databases other than Postgres
Workloads needing more than 500MB database on free tier without upgrading
Teams needing multi-region active-active database replication
best_when: Building full-stack AI applications that need a complete backend (auth + DB + storage + realtime) with Postgres flexibility and open-source self-hosting option.
avoid_when: You only need a simple key-value store, or you require a proprietary DB like MongoDB or DynamoDB.

auth.notes: anon key (public, RLS-limited) vs service_role key (bypass RLS — never expose to clients). JWT tokens issued for authenticated users. supabase-js handles token refresh automatically.

pricing.free_tier_limits: 2 free projects, 500MB DB, 1GB storage, 50MB file size, 2 concurrent active projects
pricing.paid_tiers: Pro: $25/month (8GB DB, 100GB storage); Team: $599/month; Enterprise: custom
pricing.notes: Free projects pause after 1 week of inactivity. Pro includes daily backups and no pausing. Additional compute add-ons available.

performance.rate_limits: Free: 500 requests/second; Pro: 1000 RPS; higher with add-ons

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: PostgREST errors return JSON with message and details; auth errors well-structured with AuthError type
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Upsert operations idempotent with onConflict parameter; regular inserts not idempotent
known_agent_gotchas: service_role key bypasses ALL RLS policies — using it client-side exposes your entire database; strictly server-side only
Free projects pause after 1 week inactivity — agents hitting paused project get 503; must un-pause in dashboard
Realtime CDC requires REPLICA IDENTITY FULL on tables for old record values in UPDATE events
supabase-js v1 to v2 migration was breaking — check client version in dependencies before using v2 docs
Row Level Security must be explicitly enabled per table — new tables default to no RLS (full access with anon key)

security_score_components.security_notes: RLS is the primary security model — must be enabled per table. service_role key must never leave server. JWT secret rotation requires re-issuing all tokens.
